title: Onboarding Form to Zapier Bridge
summary: Captures a new client submission in GHL, tags it, sends a welcome message, and forwards the payload into Zapier.
businessOutcome: Use GHL as the intake front door while still activating downstream automations in other tools.
thumbnail: Form submissions trigger welcome steps and cross-tool handoff.
problem: Client onboarding breaks down when CRM capture and external automations are disconnected.
solution: This workflow standardizes intake inside GHL, applies the right initial actions, and then sends the data into Zapier for downstream processing.
workflowOverview: Applies tags and sends the welcome email
Triggers the Zapier webhook for connected tools
